---
title: "Statistics, Machine learning and Data mining"
date: 2022-12-10
author: Jianqi Huang
categories: 
    - Machine Learning
    - Statistics
    - Data Mining
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
image: images/stat-ml-dm-r.png
---

- Website: <http://stats-dm-ml-r.jianqihuang.com>

- This book based on daily learning about Data Mining, Machine Learning and Statistics. Not just for theory but the practice based on mainly R language.
